title: Remote Team Security Training Tools Review - 2026
description: Comprehensive review of KnowBe4, Proofpoint, Cofense and security awareness training platforms. Compare phishing simulations, training content, and compliance features.
content:
Remote Team Security Training Tools: KnowBe4, Proofpoint, Cofense Review 2026

Overview

This comprehensive guide reviews security awareness and phishing training platforms for remote teams in 2026. We analyze KnowBe4, Proofpoint Security Awareness Training, Cofense, SANS Security Awareness, and other cybersecurity education tools, comparing phishing simulations, training content, compliance features, and reporting to help distributed teams build security awareness.

Why Remote Teams Need Security Training

Cybersecurity awareness is critical for distributed workforces:

  • Remote vulnerabilities: Home networks and personal devices increase risks
  • Phishing attacks: Target remote workers with tailored campaigns
  • Compliance requirements: SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA mandate security training
  • Cost of breaches: Average cost $4.35 million per incident

KnowBe4 Security Awareness Training

KnowBe4 is the leading security awareness platform:

  • Phishing simulator: Customizable phishing tests with 1,000+ templates
  • Training library: 1,000+ modules covering all security topics
  • Phish-prone testing: Measure baseline and track improvement
  • Automated campaigns: Schedule ongoing training and testing
  • Pricing: $3/user/month for Basic, $6/user/month for Plus
  • Reporting: Detailed analytics on employee performance

Proofpoint Security Awareness Training

Proofpoint offers enterprise-grade security education:

  • Phishing simulations: Realistic scenarios based on current threats
  • Content library: Videos, games, and interactive modules
  • Threat intelligence: Training updated with latest attack patterns
  • Email integration: Works with Proofpoint email security
  • Pricing: Custom enterprise pricing, approximately $4-8/user/month
  • Compliance: Supports GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS training requirements

Cofense PhishMe

Cofense specializes in phishing simulation and threat intelligence:

  • Phishing scenarios: 1,700+ customizable phishing templates
  • Training modules: Bite-sized lessons triggered by phishing failures
  • Threat reporting: Employees report suspicious emails easily
  • Intelligence sharing: Community-based threat detection
  • Pricing: Custom pricing, approximately $5/user/month for teams
  • Integration: Works with major email platforms

Additional Security Training Platforms

Other notable cybersecurity awareness tools:

  • SANS Security Awareness: Professional training from security experts
  • Barracuda PhishLine: Phishing simulation with email security integration
  • Webroot Security Awareness: Short, focused training modules
  • Terranova Security: Compliance-focused training platform
  • HackerOne Academy: Free security education for developers

Feature Comparison Summary

Key comparison points across platforms:

  • Market leader: KnowBe4 has largest market share and template library
  • Threat intelligence: Proofpoint and Cofense excel in current threat data
  • Content depth: SANS offers most technical training content
  • Integration: Proofpoint best for email security ecosystem

Selection Recommendations

Choose based on team needs:

  • Comprehensive platform: KnowBe4 for full awareness program
  • Email security: Proofpoint for email ecosystem integration
  • Phishing focus: Cofense for phishing-specific training
  • Technical teams: SANS for deep security education
  • Budget conscious: HackerOne Academy for free developer training
author: Cybersecurity Training Expert
